headline-lg.purpose: Card titles, the largest heading on any screen.

body-md.purpose: Default body text, form inputs, alert messages.

body-sm.purpose: Secondary text, navbar brand on mobile.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Subtle elevation for cards above the page background.

shadows.name: navbar
shadows.purpose: Frosted glass effect separating sticky navbar from scrolling content. Combined with backdrop-blur.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Floating menu content in mobile hamburger dropdown.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Prominent overlay elevation for confirmation dialogs.

motion.name: theme-transition
motion.purpose: Smooth transition when switching between winter and dim themes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Start Game, Create Player, Create New Player.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0069FF; color: #CEE4FF; padding: 8px 24px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; min-width: 7rem; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0069FF; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-btn-primary { padding: 10px 28px; font-size: 1rem; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #394E6A; padding: 8px 24px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; min-width: 7rem; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(57, 78, 106, 0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #394E6A; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 10px 28px; font-size: 1rem; } }

components.name: Soft Error Button
components.css: .ds-btn-soft-error { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FEE2E2; color: #E58B8B; padding: 8px 24px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; min-width: 7rem; } .ds-btn-soft-error:hover { background: #FECACA; } .ds-btn-soft-error:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E58B8B; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-btn-soft-error { padding: 10px 28px; font-size: 1rem; } }

components.name: Score Button (+)
components.description: Circular primary button for incrementing score.
components.css: .ds-btn-score-plus { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; background: #0069FF; color: #CEE4FF; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-score-plus:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-score-plus:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0069FF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Score Button (-)
components.description: Circular soft button for decrementing score.
components.css: .ds-btn-score-minus { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; background: rgba(57, 78, 106, 0.08); color: #394E6A; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-score-minus:hover { background: rgba(57, 78, 106, 0.15); } .ds-btn-score-minus:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #394E6A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with visible border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #394E6A; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #E3E9F4; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0069FF; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 105, 255, 0.2); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #99AAC8; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with consistent padding, border, and elevation.
components.html:
Score

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E3E9F4; border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); max-width: 48rem; } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; color: #394E6A; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; }

components.name: Alert Warning
components.html: Supabase not configured. Set environment variables to enable online features.
components.css: .ds-alert-warning { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #EFD7BC; color: #394E6A; border-radius: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: Foosball Tracker is a SolidJS single-page application for tracking foosball matches, scores, players, and teams. The visual identity is entirely derived from DaisyUI 5 component classes and Tailwind CSS v4 utility classes. No custom fonts, custom color palettes, or bespoke CSS exist beyond what DaisyUI and Tailwind provide. The app uses two built-in DaisyUI themes: winter (light, the default) and dim (dark, activated via prefers-color-scheme or toggled manually). All colours are semantic DaisyUI tokens, so they adapt automatically when the theme changes.
keyCharacteristics: Zero custom CSS. Every visual decision lives in DaisyUI classes or Tailwind utilities.
Semantic colour tokens only. No hard-coded hex in component code.
Both themes are first-class. Every UI change must work in winter and dim.
Consistency over surprise. Same button shape, same card structure, same form vocabulary on every screen.
Touch-friendly. Responsive button sizing and minimum widths for one-handed use.

rules.name: The Semantic Colour Rule
rules.body: Every colour in component code is a DaisyUI semantic token. Hard-coded Tailwind colour names are prohibited.

rules.name: The Team Colour Rule
rules.body: Yellow team uses status-warning (amber dot), black team uses status-neutral (dark dot). No other colours identify teams.

rules.name: The System Font Rule
rules.body: No custom web fonts. The system font stack is the entire typography system.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: Typography hierarchy uses a tight scale ratio (1.125-1.25 between steps). Do not introduce sizes outside the established scale.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state.

rules.name: The Backdrop Rule
rules.body: The navbar uses backdrop-blur for visual separation during scroll. Modals use bg-black/50 for overlay dimming. No glassmorphism.

dos: Do use DaisyUI semantic colour tokens for every colour in component code.
Do use responsive button sizing (btn-sm sm:btn-md) for touch-friendly mobile layouts.
Do wrap content sections in card components with card-body.
Do use alert components for all user-facing status messages.
Do test both the winter (light) and dim (dark) themes when making any UI change.
Do use fieldset and fieldset-legend for form field labelling.
Do keep maximum content width at max-w-3xl (48rem) for readability.
Do use the system font stack. No custom web fonts.
Do use backdrop-blur on the navbar for visual separation during scroll.
Do use minimum widths on buttons for consistent sizing.
donts: Don't use hard-coded Tailwind colour names (bg-blue-500, text-gray-800).
Don't add custom CSS when DaisyUI component classes or Tailwind utilities suffice.
Don't introduce new border-radius values outside the theme's --radius-field (0.5rem) and --radius-box (1rem).
Don't remove the backdrop-blur from the navbar.
Don't bypass the card component for content sections.
Don't use glassmorphism, frosted glass cards, or decorative blur.
Don't add decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
Don't use arcade-themed or retro game styling.
